query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.appRole, u.leaderId, l.name as leaderName FROM users u LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leaderId = l.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Wesley Fernandes%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2cGS7pfAKgRnQw7.root --database TWqMMTyKwbNtXYDRW545np --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.appRole, u.leaderId, l.name as leaderName FROM users u LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leaderId = l.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Wesley Fernandes%';
